Notice Of Motion And Motion To Remove Case From The Arbitration Hearing List
Off Calendar Aug-03-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendants San Mateo County Transit District, Terry Deroson's Motion to removed case from Arbitration Hearing List is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Prevaling party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered case set for Jury Trial on 1/29/2007 at 9:30 AM, in Department 212. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Court scheduled an enforcement Mediation Order to Show Cause on 10/25/2006 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212.
